Free strategy session

The Lost Referral Calculator

Your referrals are checking Google. Some of them are calling someone else.

Three numbers off the top of your head. We’ll show you — with the math in plain English — what that leak is worth in a year. We pick a deliberately low percentage; the real number is usually worse.

That’s roughly what you’re leaking a year:

$0

Even a “small” leak is a job a year you already earned and gave away — and the businesses beating you compound this every single month. The point isn’t the size. It’s that it’s happening at all.

Conservative by design: we only count referrals who defect after checking your Google presence. No invented “lead” numbers, no magic multipliers.

That’s the leak — let’s plug it → A free 30-minute session: where your jobs are leaking, and the fix in writing. Yours to keep.
Book a free session →
